flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rochester Community and Technical College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rochester Community and Technical College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rochester Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).
